data.title: PSMA-targeted therapy market to surge by 2034 due to rising prostate cancer diagnoses, enhanced awareness, and expanding clinical trials.
data.description: The PSMA-targeted therapy sector is forecasted to experience significant growth driven by increasing rates of prostate cancer diagnoses, enhanced awareness of PSMA-oriented treatments, and the growth of clinical trials for therapies like Lantheus' Lu-177-PNT2002/[Lu-177]-PSMA-I&T/PNT-2002), Telix... These factors are propelling the market forward, with key numbers indicating substantial expansion in the near future.

data.title: Ademi LLP investigating possible securities fraud claims against Chagee Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: CHA) over inaccurate statements.
data.description: A leading law firm based in Milwaukee, Ademi LLP, has launched an investigation into potential securities fraud allegations against Chagee Holdings Limited with the trading symbol NASDAQ: CHA. The inquiry has been initiated due to suspected misleading statements made by Chagee concerning its business activities and future outlook. Investors who may have been affected by this situation are encouraged to participate in the investigation by seeking further information through the provided link.

data.title: Sindhu Culas appointed President, General Manager North America of Swarovski, leading crystal and jewelry manufacturer.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 20, 2026, Sindhu Culas has been appointed as the President and General Manager for North America at Swarovski, a renowned crystal and jewelry maker. Situated in New York City, Culas will undertake the crucial role of enhancing Swarovski's overall physical and digital footprint to drive growth in the region.

data.title: Vivos Therapeutics closes warrant exercise for $4.64M in gross proceeds.
data.description: The latest report reveals that the country's economy grew by 3.5% in the last quarter, marking a significant increase from the previous year. Unemployment rates have dropped to 4.2%, the lowest level in five years. The stock market has also experienced a surge, with the main index reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. Analysts attribute this growth to increased consumer spending and a boost in exports. Additionally, inflation remains stable at 2.5%. The government has announced plans to further stimulate the economy and create more job opportunities in the coming months.

data.title: Astra ships 110 satellite engines; focuses on 2026 new rocket test flight; key milestone surpassed; production scale increased.
data.description: In Alameda, California, Astra has unveiled a significant milestone by shipping 110 satellite engine systems since January 1, 2025. This accomplishment surpasses a crucial operating goal set after the company's privatization in 2024. The progress signifies a notable increase in production capacity and operational precision. Despite this achievement, Astra has been actively working on the development of its novel rocket and mobile launch system, scheduled for a test flight in 2026. Noteworthy figures for 2025 include the shipment of 110 satellite engine systems since the beginning of the year.

data.title: Diodes Inc. to reveal Q4 and FY 2025 financial results on Feb 10, 2026. Call at 4 pm CT to discuss. Gary Yu, Brett Whitmire, and Emily Yang to lead.
data.description: Diodes Incorporated (Nasdaq: DIOD) is set to hold a conference call on Tuesday, February 10, 2026, at 4:00 p.m. CT (5:00 p.m. ET) to talk about its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025. Gary Yu, President and CEO of Diodes Incorporated, along with Brett Whitmire, CFO, and Emily Yang, Senior VP of Worldwide Sales and Marketing, will be present during the call. The company plans to release this announcement to the public.

data.title: Core CPI inflation stays at 2.6% in December, supporting S&P 500 futures and increasing Fed rate-cut chances.
data.description: In December, the core Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation remained steady at a modest 2.6%, defying expectations. This has led to a surge in S&P 500 futures and raised the likelihood of a Federal Reserve interest rate cut. This post-CPI data has been described as 'Goldilocks,' indicating a favorable economic balance.

data.title: Clasp COO leads healthcare employers in federal committee to connect higher education to workforce outcomes. David Kafafian negotiates to strengthen talent pipelines. Jan. 20, 2026.
data.description: David Kafafian, the COO of Clasp, took on the role of lead negotiator representing employers and the business sector in discussions regarding new regulations from the Department of Education. These regulations aim to bolster support for valuable talent pipelines as shortages become imminent. The negotiations occurred in Boston on January 20, 2026. This development underscores the importance of addressing talent shortages and enhancing workforce support.

data.title: Over 200 workers at Suffolk County Jail in Boston join Teamsters Local 25 after voting overwhelmingly.
data.description: In a significant development, over 200 corrections officers and jail staff based at the Suffolk County Jail on Nashua Street in Boston have decisively chosen to become members of Teamsters Local 25. The vote, which took place recently, indicates that a vast majority of the employees expressed their support for this move. This decision comes after a considerable period of time during which the workers have been considering their options. The move to join Teamsters Local 25 signifies a significant shift in the representation of these workers.

data.title: EvolvOptic chosen to provide prototype mirror components for NSF OPAL, supporting research into large-aperture mirrors.
data.description: EvolvOptic has been chosen to produce prototype lightweight mirror elements for review by the University of Rochester's Laboratory for Laser Energetics. This initiative is in line with the early-stage development backing NSF OPAL and aims to aid research on manufacturable, large-aperture mirror components.

data.title: Aris Investing launches Long-Short Strategy, a tax-efficient solution for advisors, addressing "tax-decay" issues.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Aris Investing, a prominent player in tax-conscious investment management, unveiled its Long-Short Strategy. This innovative initiative offers advisors a cutting-edge, all-in-one solution to tackle the increasing issues related to "tax-decay." The strategy aims to optimize tax efficiency while maximizing returns for clients.
Trump: taking over Panama Canal sort of still on agenda

data.title: Dave Inc. appoints Nima Khajehnouri to Board of Directors, as Imran Khan steps down. Khajehnouri joins as Audit Committee member.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Dave Inc. revealed that Nima Khajehnouri, a prominent figure in artificial intelligence and data engineering, has joined its Board of Directors. The company, a key neobank in the nation, disclosed this news, indicating that Mr. Khajehnouri will be a part of the Audit Committee. This appointment comes as Imran Khan, a Board member since August 2023, steps down from his position. Dave Inc., listed on Nasdaq as DAVE, continues to make strategic moves in its leadership, with this latest addition bringing expertise to the board.

data.title: Delaware Life and BlackRock introduce first Bitcoin-linked annuity, giving crypto exposure with principal protection.
data.description: Delaware Life has introduced a groundbreaking product in the insurance sector - the industry's inaugural Bitcoin-linked annuity. This innovative offering provides customers with exposure to cryptocurrency while also ensuring protection of their principal investment. This move marks a significant advancement in the sector, as traditional insurance products have not previously included this type of digital asset option. Delaware Life's pioneering initiative reflects the growing interest in the cryptocurrency market, with Bitcoin being a focal point. This development opens up new avenues for investors seeking to diversify and engage with the evolving financial landscape.

data.title: Pilgrim’s Pride Corp to post 2025 results on Feb 11, earnings call on Feb 12 at 7am MT with Q&A session.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Pilgrim’s Pride Corporation (NASDAQ: PPC) announced their plan to unveil their financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025. The disclosure is set to take place post the U.S. market closure on February 11. Subsequently, on February 12, 2026, at 7:00 a.m. MT (9:00 a.m. ET), the company's executives will conduct a conference call and webcast to discuss these results. The event will consist of a presentation on the financial and operational outcomes, followed by a Q&A session with the Pilgrim’s executive management team. Before the market opens that day, a press release along with supplementary materials will be shared.

data.title: Tempest sets January 30, 2026, as the record date for distributing warrants as a dividend to stockholders.
data.description: Tempest Therapeutics, Inc., a biotechnology company listed on Nasdaq under TPST, based in Brisbane, California, declared a record date of January 30, 2026, for issuing warrants to purchase Tempest common stock as dividends. This decision is in line with their Asset Purchase Agreement with Erigen LLC and Factor Bioscience Inc. The distribution of these warrants, anticipated on February 3, 2026, is contingent upon meeting the Closing Conditions, which include obtaining stockholder approval for Proposal 5 per the definitive proxy statement filed on December 31, 2025.

data.title: US Commerce Department finds Chinese fiberglass door panels sold below fair value; Preliminary dumping rates range from 38.78% to TBD.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, the U.S. Department of Commerce declared that Chinese manufacturers are selling fiberglass door panels in the U.S. below fair market value. The Commerce Department imposed initial dumping rates between 38.78% and an undisclosed upper limit. The decision comes after a thorough investigation into the matter.

data.title: Currenc Group receives Nasdaq deficiency notification for not holding annual meeting, affecting compliance with Nasdaq rules.
data.description: Singapore-based Currenc Group Inc. (Nasdaq: CURR), a leading fintech company providing AI solutions to global financial institutions, recently reported receiving a notification letter from Nasdaq on January 12, 2026. This letter, known as the Nasdaq Annual Meeting Deficiency Letter, highlighted that the company had not conducted an annual shareholder meeting within twelve months of its fiscal year-end. Consequently, Currenc was found to be non-compliant with Nasdaq Listing Rules 5620(a) and 5810(c)(2)(G), along with IM-5620. The disclosure of this letter was made on January 13, 2026, with Nasdaq emphasizing that there would be no immediate impact on the trading or listing of Currenc's securities on the exchange.

data.title: MAA reveals taxable composition of 2025 distributions to shareholders on Jan. 20, 2026. No portion expected in return.
data.description: Today, MAA (NYSE: MAA) disclosed the taxable breakdown of the 2025 distributions made to shareholders. Based in Germantown, Tenn., the company stated it anticipates no part of the distributions paid to shareholders in 2025 to be...

data.title: NOG to announce Q4 & year-end 2025 results on Feb 25, 2026, with conference call on Feb 26, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. CT.
data.description: Northern Oil and Gas, Inc. (NYSE: NOG) disclosed its intent to release the financial and operational results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on Wednesday, February 25, 2026, post-market closure. The Company will conduct a conference call on Thursday, February 26, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. Central Time. Interested individuals can participate in the conference call either through phone access or by accessing the Company's webcast. For detailed information on the Conference Call and Webcast, stay tuned.
